form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 2500m at this track beaten 1.1 m by I Can Too (3:05.10) in 3yo+ on March 31 at $4.80. Rates highly and should be in the finish.

previousStarts.class: 3YO+ R48 TO R55, R56 TO R60 WITH COND.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr6) over 2500m at this track, beaten 11 m by Easy Does It (3:12.60) in 3yo+ on March 29 at $5.90. Two runs back won by 2.75 m (Sr1) at Central Southland Raceway (1:55.90) beating Sherwood Maggie in 4yo+ on February 26 at $8.70. Capable of playing a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced middle stages. Paced roughly near the 950m and again near the 350m.
Raced wide early. Held up middle stages of the run home.
Shifted ground outwards near the 300m which briefly hampered outside runners.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr2) over 2000m at this track, beaten 30 m by Blue Chip Lou (2:26.20) on March 31 at $27.70. Before that 7th (Fr3) over 2000m at this track beaten 16 m by Fredastaire (2:25.40) in 3yo+ on March 29 at $24.50. This looks far too tough.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr8) over 2200m at Cambridge Raceway beaten 16 m by Midfrew Lando (2:44.90) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $35.70. Two runs back 4th (Fr4) over 2200m at Cambridge Raceway, beaten 14 m by Midfrew Lucre (2:41.60) in 3yo+ on March 19 at $10.20. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 1.1 m as favourite (Fr2) at this track (3:05.10) beating Brookies Player in 3yo+ on March 31 at $2. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (10m U1) over 2500m at this track beaten 15 m by Melton Mogul (3:08.10) in 3yo+ on March 12 at $3.60. Before that, 4th (Fr1) over 1700m at Alexandra Park beaten 10 m by Lady Of The Light (2:02.40) in 4yo+ M on March 6 at $9.70. Leading contender on best form.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old gelding showed improvement last start. 2nd (Fr5) over 2000m at this track beaten 3.5 m by Blue Chip Lou (2:26.20) on March 31 at $15.30. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into sixth behind Fredastaire at this track over 2000m in a 3yo+ on March 29 at $24. Go well.
